The '''Q-6100''' was a model of ground vehicle in the [[Q-series]] manufactured by [[Jadai Motors]]. Out of production since [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]], during the decades that followed it became popular on backwater [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The body was made out of metal instead of synthetics which made it a very sturdy vehicle.<ref name="AIR" />

The [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Callandri]] owned one of these vehicles; it was usually kept within the cargo hold of her [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[Nightcast]]''.<ref name="AIR" />
